implementation_summary.summary: CP00-702 extends the RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P02 test/evidence/review bridge descriptor over 40 planned units from RP23.P02.M07.S13 through RP23.P02.M09.S08 while preserving CP00-694 through CP00-701 as historical foundation evidence and keeping bank, card, WEHAGO, Douzone, tax export, DART, financial payload, credential, permission, audit, Hermes, and runtime surfaces closed.

commit_policy.commit_message: Close CP00-702 finance integrations P02 test evidence review bridge pack

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-702 RP23.P02.M07.S13-RP23.P02.M09.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
